chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. D- 26 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.01.2026 For orders on MA 480/26 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 481/26 For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Dilawar Qureshi, Advocate along with applicant 1. Urgent granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicant Jinsar is nominated as accused in NAB Reference No. 02 of 2023. Learned counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicant due to malafide intentions; and, that the applicant being law abiding citizen wishes to face trial; however, he is apprehensive that before reaching trial court he might be arrested and subsequently humiliated and disgraced. He therefore seeks legal shelter. Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail for a period of ten days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the amount of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In case, the applicant fails to appear before the concerned court within the stipulated period the surety amount shall be forfeited. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of ten days i.e. 31.01.2026 or when the applicant surrender himself before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
